parked_reason: Omics track deferred from v0: labels require single-cell/expression-methods currency the sole author cannot defend cold.
evidence_vignette: Bulk RNA-seq comparing tumor to adjacent normal tissue shows Gene Y strongly upregulated (log2FC 3.2, FDR<0.001); Gene Y is in a proliferation-associated pathway.
proposed_claim: Gene Y drives tumor growth and is a promising drug target.

evidence_vignette: Gene Z is highly conserved from yeast to humans (low dN/dS). A rare missense variant in Gene Z was seen in one patient with a neurodevelopmental disorder.
proposed_claim: Because Gene Z is highly conserved, this variant causes the patient's disorder.
note: Label would derive cleanly from ACMG/AMP (Richards et al., Genet Med 2015) if the track is revived.

parked_reason: Requires animal-model translation judgment; superseded by gen-drugtarget-mr-005 which tests compounding within genetics.
evidence_vignette: GWAS variant -> whole-blood eQTL for Gene A -> insulin-signaling pathway annotation -> mouse knockout shows a metabolic phenotype.
proposed_claim: Inhibiting Gene A's protein will treat the disease in patients.
